data.title: Solana whales sold off millions of dollars worth of WhiteWhale tokens, causing the price to plummet by 20% instantly.
data.description: According to Bubblemaps, the Solana Chain whale wallet (8Ldjm), which once drove the price of WhiteWhale from $60,000 to $2.5 million, suddenly resurfaced after 30 days of inactivity, dumping approximately $1 million worth of WhiteWhale within 15 minutes, causing the price to plummet by 20%. This address was the largest buyer before the CTO's purchase and was once the second-largest holder, currently still holding 2.5% of the total supply. The WhiteWhale team stated that the wallet was not an insider and that they attempted to propose an OTC protocol to alleviate the selling pressure but were rejected.

data.title: Solana Whale Wallet Activity Causes Significant Price Drop
data.description: According to PANews, a Solana whale wallet, identified as 8Ldjm, has reactivated after a 30-day dormancy, leading to a notable market impact. The wallet, which previously increased its holdings from $60,000 to $2.5 million, sold approximately $1 million worth of WhiteWhale tokens within 15 minutes, causing the token's price to plummet by 20%. This wallet was the largest buyer before the CTO's acquisition and was once the second-largest holder, currently possessing 2.5% of the total supply. The WhiteWhale team clarified that the wallet is not associated with insiders and had declined an OTC agreement aimed at mitigating the selling pressure.

data.title: Standard Chartered lowers its medium-term Ethereum forecast: predicts a price of $7,500 by the end of 2026.
data.description: Standard Chartered Bank has lowered its medium-term price forecast for Ethereum, reducing its year-end 2026 price prediction to $7,500 from $12,000 and its year-end 2028 price prediction to $22,000 from $25,000. Geoffrey Kendrick, Global Head of Digital Asset Research, stated that Bitcoin's continued dominance in the space and its weaker-than-expected performance have dampened the outlook for all digital assets against the US dollar. The bank still expects Ethereum to exceed $40,000 by 2030, raising its long-term target from $30,000. (Cointele)

data.title: Bybit Alpha listed on Buttcoin
data.description: Bybit Alpha has launched its on-chain token $Buttcoin. $Buttcoin is a meme token marketed for its humorous and abstract style.

data.title: BitMine disclosed that it increased its holdings by 24,266 ETH last week, bringing its total holdings to 4.168 million ETH.
data.description: Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies disclosed its current crypto asset holdings, including 4,167,768 ETH, 192 BTC, $23 million worth of Eightco Holdings equity, and $988 million in cash-free assets. It added 24,266 ETH last week. (PRNewswire)

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies Reveals Cryptocurrency Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, BitMine Immersion Technologies has disclosed its current cryptocurrency holdings. The company possesses 4,167,768 ETH and 192 BTC. Additionally, it holds Eightco Holdings equity valued at $23 million and maintains $988 million in unencumbered cash. Last week, the company increased its Ethereum holdings by 24,266 ETH.

data.title: Bitfinex Alpha report: BTC tests $93,500–$95,000 resistance zone, entering a range-bound trading phase.
data.description: A Bitfinex Alpha report indicates that after rebounding from its lows near $80,800 in late November, Bitcoin continues to test the key resistance zone between $93,500 and $95,000. Short-term price movements remain constrained by factors such as divergent ETF fund flows. Bitcoin is currently entering a dense supply zone comprised of buyers who exited near recent highs, with a cost base between $92,100 and $117,400. As prices return to this area, holders looking to break even may increase selling pressure, creating significant upward resistance or triggering "break-even selling pressure," potentially leading to range-bound trading. The derivatives market reflects cautious optimism, characterized by both long-term bullish positions and short-term downside hedging.

data.title: Trump will interview BlackRock executive Rick Rieder for the position of Federal Reserve Chairman.
data.description: Trump will interview BlackRock executive Rick Rieder for the position of Federal Reserve Chairman this week. (Jinshi)

data.title: Spot gold broke through $4,610/oz, and spot silver broke through $85/oz.
data.description: Spot gold broke through $4,610 per ounce, up 2.22% on the day. Spot silver surged 7.00% on the day, currently trading at $85.53 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bakkt Acquires Stablecoin Payment Firm, Plans Name Change
data.description: According to Foresight News, New York Stock Exchange-listed company Bakkt has announced its acquisition of stablecoin payment infrastructure provider Distributed Technologies Research (DTR). The completion of this transaction is contingent upon the fulfillment or waiver of customary closing conditions, including approvals from relevant regulatory authorities and Bakkt shareholders. Additionally, Bakkt has revealed plans to change its company name to 'Bakkt, Inc.' starting January 22, 2026, while maintaining its current stock trading symbol.

data.title: BitGo has filed for a US IPO, aiming to raise approximately $201 million.
data.description: Crypto custody company BitGo has filed for an IPO in the United States, planning to issue 11.8 million shares at a price range of $15 to $17 per share, raising up to approximately $201 million. Founded in 2013, BitGo is one of the largest cryptocurrency custody providers in the US. The IPO will use the ticker symbol "BTGO" and is planned to list on the New York Stock Exchange. Goldman Sachs and Citigroup are the underwriters. (Reuters)

data.title: BitGo Files for IPO on NYSE, Aiming to Raise $201 Million
data.description: According to PANews, cryptocurrency custody firm BitGo has filed for an initial public offering (IPO) in the United States. The company plans to issue 11.8 million shares, with a price range set between $15 and $17 per share, potentially raising up to $201 million. Established in 2013, BitGo is one of the largest crypto asset custodians in the U.S. The company intends to list on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 'BTGO.' Goldman Sachs and Citigroup are acting as underwriters for the offering.

data.title: White House Economic Adviser Expresses Interest in Federal Reserve Role
data.description: According to Odaily, White House National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett stated that Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell is a good person, but Hassett remains interested in a position at the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Hassett: I don't know if Trump has approved the investigation into the Federal Reserve.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that he did not know whether President Trump had approved the investigation into the Federal Reserve, and estimated that President Trump had not yet been briefed by the Justice Department on the Federal Reserve case. (Jinshi)
